replay_env: GE007_DISABLE_LEVEL_INTRO=1 GE007_AUTO_ADD_ITEM=8 GE007_AUTO_ADD_ITEM_FRAME=30 GE007_AUTO_ADD_WEAPON_AMMO=8 GE007_AUTO_ADD_WEAPON_AMMO_AMOUNT=600 GE007_AUTO_ADD_WEAPON_AMMO_FRAME=30 GE007_AUTO_EQUIP_ITEM=8 GE007_AUTO_EQUIP_ITEM_FRAME=45
note: AK47 (ITEM_AK47=8, full-auto machinegun) sustained-fire tape on the Dam (FID-0056 / P1d). Bond is given+equipped the AK47 with 600 rifle rounds (replay_env, deterministic state injection) and holds fire for 400 ticks (GE007_AUTO_FIRE=80:400 baked into the captured OSContPad stream). Unlike the PP7 tape (dam_combat_guard6) this reaches the full-auto machinegun case in src/game/gun.c (~line 18359-18372: fire_rate = bondwalkItemGetAutomaticFiringRate() then fireRateEffectiveAutoRate()), so it is the end-to-end gate for the FID-0056 fire-rate call-site that the ROM-free unit test (tests/test_fire_rate_authentic.c) cannot cover (P1d: the unit test re-implements the gate; a call-site revert stays green). sim_state_hash is the DEFAULT (Input.FireRateAuthentic=1, faithful N64 cadence) hash; fire_rate_authentic_off_hash is the pre-FID-0056 legacy-cadence hash (GE007_FIRE_RATE_AUTHENTIC=0), which is exactly what a gun.c call-site revert reproduces. ON != OFF proves the tape exercises the divisor: a call-site revert reddens this baseline. Deterministic: record==replay1==replay2==replay3 (byte-exact). Regenerate only via scratchpad/record_ak47_final.sh (canonical recipe; keep in sync with tools/fidelity/ak47_fire_rate_capture_smoke.sh). Guarded by tools/fidelity/ak47_fire_rate_capture_smoke.sh (ctest port_ak47_fire_rate_capture_smoke) + tools/fidelity/tape_regression.sh (via replay_env).
